sizing_rule.note: Position sizing calibrated to volatility measure (21-day extreme vs 20-day ATR). Use 5% equity per trade when 20-day ATR is stable/declining. Scale inversely when volatility expands. Different volatility metrics require different equity percentages for equivalent risk levels.

source_rule_text: A trader should calibrate position sizing percentages based on the volatility measure used (21-day extreme vs. 20-day ATR), recognizing that equivalent risk levels require different equity percentages depending on the underlying volatility metric.
